calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-04-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: L. Perez.
Petitioners: SHeila Fonseca and Manuel Miranda Ribeiro Fonseca, are present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Manuel Alexandre Knopoff Fonseca.
Petitioners were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name of the minor were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Manuel Alexandre (First Name) Knopoff (Middle Name) Fonseca (Last Name).
Decree signed in open court.
